---
title: "Contact Details"
---

::: {.page-title}
I am open to internships, graduate roles, research collaborations, and conversations about analytics, machine learning, and business strategy.
:::

::: {.contact-wrap}
<div class="contact-methods">
<div class="contact-row">
<span class="contact-label">Location</span>
<span>Dublin, Ireland</span>
</div>

<a class="contact-row contact-email" href="mailto:saahil.bhatt30@gmail.com">
<span class="contact-label">Email</span>
<span>saahil.bhatt30@gmail.com</span>
</a>

<div class="social-icon-row" aria-label="Social profile links">
<a class="social-icon-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/sahil-bhattacharya-257924228" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="LinkedIn profile">
<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
<span>LinkedIn</span>
</a>

<a class="social-icon-link" href="https://github.com/Saahil0206" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="GitHub profile">
<i class="bi bi-github"></i>
<span>GitHub</span>
</a>
</div>
</div>

## Send a Message

::: {.contact-form}
<form action="https://formspree.io/f/YOUR_FORMSPREE_ID" method="POST">
  <label for="name">Your name</label>
  <input type="text" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Jane Smith" required>

  <label for="email">Your email</label>
  <input type="email" id="email" name="email" placeholder="jane@example.com" required>

  <label for="message">Message</label>
  <textarea id="message" name="message" placeholder="Write your message here..." required></textarea>

  <button type="submit">Send Message</button>
</form>
:::

Replace `YOUR_FORMSPREE_ID` with your Formspree form ID when you are ready to receive messages.
:::
